title: sphaerocephalus viscosus
intro: Sphaerocephalus viscosus, also known as sticky skullcap, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as dyspepsia and stomach ulcers, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sphaerocephalus viscosus include its ability to soothe gastrointestinal problems, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Sphaerocephalus viscosus may include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
